questionHtml:
Which compound can be oxidized when heated with an acidified solution of potassium dichromate(VI)?

A. CH3C(O)CH2CH3

B. CH3CH2CH(OH)CH3

C. (CH3)3COH

D. CH3(CH2)2COOH
